name: mdx-starter
title: MDX Starter
description: @interlace/ui — the components most MDX pipelines need (Callout, Prose, CodeBlock, Tag), wired through a default mdx-components.tsx.

files.content:
# @interlace/mdx-starter

Installed:

- `Callout` — info / warn / danger / success / note prose annotations.
- `Prose` — typographic article-body wrapper.
- `CodeBlock` — Shiki-rendered fenced code with copy button.
- `Tag` + `TagList` — article tag badges.
- `Figure` — image + caption + alt + AspectRatio.
- `theme` — full DS CSS baseline.

Wire into your MDX pipeline by spreading the DS defaults into your
mdx-components.tsx. See https://ds.interlace.tools/getting-started
